case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS ARMANDO TUZ BRICENO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRICENO, LUIS ARMANDO TUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRICENO, LUIS ARMANDO TUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ARMANDO TUZ BRICENO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS ARMANDO TUZ BRICENO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
